model.description: Simplified LIHTC sizing model for early-stage feasibility. Does NOT model qualified basis, applicable fraction, carryover, or investor-specific pricing. Not a substitute for lender underwriting or CHFA review.

data_sources.label: HUD Fair Market Rents (gross rent limits by AMI tier)
data_sources.notes: Used as maximum gross rent limits per AMI tier. Actual achievable rents may differ.

data_sources.label: HUD Income Limits (AMI thresholds)
data_sources.notes: Area Median Income limits used to set rent tier eligibility thresholds.

credit_rate_9pct.label: 9% credit rate (new construction)
credit_rate_9pct.source: IRC § 42(b)(1) — fixed 9% rate for new construction
credit_rate_9pct.notes: The applicable percentage is fixed by statute for competitive 9% credits. 4% credits vary monthly.

credit_years.label: 10-year credit period
credit_years.notes: Standard 10-year credit delivery period under LIHTC statute.

eligible_basis_pct.label: Eligible basis % (default 80%)
eligible_basis_pct.notes: Percentage of TDC treated as eligible basis. QCT/DDA sites may qualify for up to 130% under IRC § 42(d)(5)(B). User-adjustable.

equity_price.label: Credit pricing ($/credit, default $0.90)
equity_price.notes: Investor equity price per dollar of annual LIHTC credit. Varies by market, location, and deal structure (typical range: $0.85–$0.98).

widgets.label: LIHTC Credit Estimates
widgets.notes: Screening-level estimates based on eligible basis, credit rate, and credit pricing assumptions. Does not reflect CHFA scoring, competitive allocation likelihood, or investor-specific pricing.

widgets.label: Supportable First Mortgage Estimate
widgets.notes: Derived from NOI ÷ (DCR × mortgage constant). Planning-level only. Actual lender sizing depends on underwriting criteria.

widgets.label: Sources & Uses Summary
widgets.notes: Simplified S&U. Gap = TDC − (equity + first mortgage + deferred dev fee). Does not include all potential funding sources.
